Appearances:
Plaintiff PATRICIA HESTER, is present.
Attorney, MARC SEIDENFELD, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, MESHAWN DESPANIE, is present.
Attorney, NISHA PATEL , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem ROGER RUBIN, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503A, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JAN-24-2010 remains on calendar.
